sentences.arabic: يَصْحُو نَبِيلٌ فِي السَّاعَةِ السَّادِسَةِ وَيُعِدُّ نَفْسَهُ لِلْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Nabil se budi u šest sati i priprema se za posao.
sentences.translationEn: Nabil wakes up at six o'clock and prepares himself for work.
He eats a quick breakfast and puts on his clothes.

sentences.arabic: يَخْرُجُ مِنَ الْبَيْتِ فِي السَّاعَةِ السَّابِعَةِ وَالنِّصْفِ.
sentences.translation: Izlazi iz kuće u pola osam.
sentences.translationEn: He leaves the house at half past seven.

sentences.arabic: يَصِلُ إِلَى الْعَمَلِ قَبْلَ بِدَايَةِ الدَّوَامِ بِعَشْرِ دَقَائِقَ.
sentences.translation: Stiže na posao deset minuta prije početka radnog vremena.
sentences.translationEn: He arrives at work ten minutes before the shift starts.
